name: Sweet & Sour Sauce for Ham
recipeIngredient: 1/3 cup firmly packed light brown sugar
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the butter in a saucepan over low heat.
2. Add the flour and stir until smooth.
3. Gradually add the sugar, beating constantly to prevent lumps.
4. Stir in the beaten egg, mustard, and vinegar.
5. Mix in the pineapple.
6. Continue cooking, stirring frequently, until the mixture thickens.
7. Serve hot or cold with baked ham or broiled ham slices.
Yield: 1 1/4 cups sauce
